title: CoeluriaCore
description: Small utility mod that (might) enhances game experience
body:
I've made this mod to do things that Minecraft Data Pack can't do.

* Remove character limit for command (starts with /)
* Add complex recipe for Netherite Scrap

To see recipe of Netherite Scrap, please refer to JEI. You can obtain the recipe if you have Ghast Tear in your inventory.
